svg.title: EmotionMirror full-stack architecture diagram
svg.desc: Three-layer architecture: ML core (PyTorch CNN + GradCAM), backend (FastAPI), and frontend (React + React Native) connected via REST API and WebSocket.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about training the CNN emotion classifier for EmotionMirror')
sendPrompt('How does GradCAM work and how do I implement it in EmotionMirror?')
sendPrompt('Should I use MediaPipe or OpenCV for face detection in EmotionMirror?')
sendPrompt('What is TorchServe and do I need it for EmotionMirror?')
sendPrompt('How do I structure the FastAPI backend for EmotionMirror?')
sendPrompt('What should I store in the database for EmotionMirror journal feature?')
sendPrompt('How should I use Redis in EmotionMirror?')
sendPrompt('How do I integrate the LLM journaling prompt feature in EmotionMirror?')
sendPrompt('How do I implement the real-time webcam emotion detection in the React frontend?')
sendPrompt('How do I build the React Native mobile version of EmotionMirror?')
sendPrompt('What charting library should I use for the emotion timeline in EmotionMirror?')
sendPrompt('How do I add authentication to EmotionMirror?')

g.text: Deploy: Vercel (React) · Railway (FastAPI) · HuggingFace Spaces (model) · Expo EAS (mobile)
